info.english_meaning: to thunder to roar to make a loud sound

upasarga_meanings.meaning: GaRwA yA paSu ke samAna Sabda karanA
GaRwA yA paSu ke samAna Sabda karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: pronnanAda ca siMhavat' (hari॰2.61.47) proccErjagarjetyarTaH unnanAdeti pAWAntaram
'yayO surARAM pUtanogratejAH samunnadantI yuDi siMhanAdAn' (hari0 35362) uccEH samaM nadantItyAha
'tataH sa tezAM rudatAM mahAtmanAM BuvaM ca KaM cAnu vinAdayansvanaH' (rA0 210340) sutamAM pratiDvanayannityarTaH
'vinadya ca guhAM vIro GorAM mAyAmayIM nfpa' (hari0 28448) vinadya nAdavatIM kftvA
'naBaSca pfTivIM cEva tumulo (GozaH) vyanunAdayan' (gItA 119) vyanunAdayan nAdena pUrayan
'sUtAH paramasaMskArA mAgaDAScottamaSrutAH gAyakAH stutiSIlASca ninadantaH pfTak pfTak' (rA0 2653) uccErvyAharanta ityarTaH
'anye'ntarikze'Byanadan GarmAnta iva toyadAH' (BA0 saBA0 127148) aByanadan AkroSan uccErAkrandan
'niSamya taM (ninAdaM) pratyanadaMstu kOravAH' (BA0 droRa0 10937) pratyanadan pratiGozamakurvan
'gamBIraM pratinadyeva ninAdaM nadato giriH' (rAja0 4285) gamBIraM pratinadya kftaM nAdamuddiSya gaBIraM naditvA
